name: android-libbase
title: android-libbase
description:
Android base library
This library provides APIs for basic tasks like handling files, Unicode
strings, logging, memory allocation, integer parsing, etc..
.
This library is only used by Android SDK currently.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-libbase because Android base library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-libbase as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-libbase with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-libbase --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
